description: Light weight, low top and effortlessly cool, this sneaker is a deconstructed version of the classic sneaker. The minimalistic style in this Salva shoe will be a refreshing add to your shoe closet. Make this feather light pair your season staple and stay in-vogue this spring!UpperFabric upper with felt overlaysPerforations on the medial side of the midfootReinforced overlay at the heelMesh innerCentral lace upsPadded tongue and footbedMidsoleUber light, fila-Lite rubber midsole OutsoleSingle piece rubber outsole with herringbone lugs at the forefoot with two suction pointsShoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
